title: Jo (the opener)
html:
TL;DR

  • May 2023 — origin journal for the Jo relationship: the lonely-wolf-meme self-image meeting its first sustained mutual emotional connection
  • Met Jo at the Dinsdales via mutual connection Zoe; saw her again the next night at "the iconic Chase entertainment party" where she thought his name was Demarcus
  • First date was an escape room (booked because he'd watched the rain forecast 2 days out and wanted a backup to mini-golf) — Yahir overthought eye-contact + wittiness and "failed"
  • Multi-week recovery via texting + a Zoe-smells-like-cheese house party; redemption date at "The Show" where he stripped all expectations except making eye contact — "fucking amazing"
  • Everything Everywhere All At Once watched together as the "lioning sense" moment of wanting to share a film with a beautiful soul
  • Closes on the loyalty/care commitment: "willing to give her way more than is beyond love" + Gsmitty's warning about love-as-blinding-drug

Notes

The Jo relationship's foundational doc — written before the August breakup by ~10 weeks. Yahir lays out the courtship sequence in order: meeting at the Dinsdales (via Zoe) → Chase party (mistaken-name "Demarcus") → first date escape-room over-prep → flop date → text drought → party reconnection → redemption date at The Show + frozen yogurt + EEAAO movie.

The piece is also the clearest single statement of the lone-wolf-meme self-image that runs through Yahir's pre-Jo journals: "I have lived my life as that lonely wolf meme, going thru the world with a lot of burden and weight." When he meets a real candidate for emotional reciprocity, the disorientation is the topic.

Two motifs that recur in the Jo arc:

  • Pre-emptive logistics as care: booking the escape room two days early because rain was forecasted = "the semi-creepy but also admirable side of me"
  • Eye contact as sole metric: After failing first-date by optimizing too many things, his rule for The Show date was "the only thing that matters is making the human connection — eye contact"

Gsmitty gets the wisdom-from-the-friend role here: love-as-drug warning. The doc closes with the pre-breakup vulnerability declaration: "loyalty, care, attention, safety, relaxation."

Connects to: 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup (the closure), 2022 10 15 5 21 2022 thoughts (the lone-wolf state pre-Jo).

related.label: Aug 2023 thoughts — the Jo breakup post-mortem (kids, pedicure date, Beef show, Salem trip)
